description: Public-domain federal benefits publications that make up the fedbench corpus. All documents are works of the US federal government and not subject to copyright (17 USC §105). Each entry pins a URL and a SHA-256 checksum so a fork can verify it received exactly the same bytes the eval was run against.

documents.title: Medicare & You — The Official U.S. Government Medicare Handbook
documents.scope: Flagship Medicare handbook. Covers eligibility, enrollment timing, Parts A/B/C/D, premiums, coverage details, and rights/protections. The breadth makes it the primary corpus document; many caseworker questions resolve here.

documents.title: Your Medicare Benefits
documents.scope: What's covered, what's not, and the cost-sharing structure for specific services. Narrower focus than the main handbook. Useful retrieval-distinguishing test: questions that read like they belong here vs. in Medicare & You.

documents.title: Your Guide to Medicare Prescription Drug Coverage
documents.scope: Part D specifically — drug plans, formularies, coverage gap, Extra Help / Low Income Subsidy. Distinct enough from the others to test cross-document retrieval.
